name: io.github.boostuagency/boostu-teamleader-mcp
description: Open-source MCP server for Teamleader Focus CRM. Use Teamleader inside Claude and other AI assistants: contacts, deals, quotations, invoices, projects and more.

environment_variables.name: TEAMLEADER_CLIENT_ID
environment_variables.description: Your Teamleader Focus integration Client ID

environment_variables.name: TEAMLEADER_CLIENT_SECRET
environment_variables.description: Your Teamleader Focus integration Client Secret

environment_variables.name: TEAMLEADER_REFRESH_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: OAuth2 refresh token from the one-time authorization

environment_variables.name: TEAMLEADER_TOKEN_STORE
environment_variables.description: Path to persist the rotated refresh token (default .teamleader-token)

environment_variables.name: TEAMLEADER_TOOLS
environment_variables.description: Comma-separated tool groups to enable (default: all groups)
